D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

Slicing CIELUV

slide the lightness and compare CIELUV's slice with CIELAB — same colours, a different stretch

CIELUV uses the same L* as CIELAB but lays out chromaticity with the u*v* transform, the one that keeps additive colour mixtures on straight lines — handy for displays.

Slide the lightness L*. The filled island is the sRGB gamut at that level on the u*v* plane. Compare its shape to the CIELAB page at the same lightness — the colours are identical, but the spacing differs.
